title: If You Were Redesigning The Evangelions
display_title: If You Were Redesigning The Evangelions
wikitext:
[]: If You Were Redesigning The Evangelions...             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Fri Apr 05, 2013 1:50 pm Basic question: If Hideaki Anno/Gainax/Khara came to you and said "Hey, we're making a new Evangelion TV series, and we want you to do the new Evangelion unit designs! Just make sure they look different from their previous incarnations, OK?" what changes would you make to the Evas? My personal opinions: General: Whereas Rebuild made the Evangelions a lot more humanly proportioned, with smaller pylons, less top-heavy bodies and a fairly equal waist/chest ratio, I would actually go the other way and make them more...inhuman, I guess. I'd give them bigger plons, a more pronounced slouch, narrower waists, bigger "backpacks" (the bulky mass of armour around the entry plug and above the power socket) a generally more "monstrous" look. I'd also give them some kind of forearm armour, as the "sleeve" thing does irk me a bit. Unit 01 (Shogouki): I'd keep the green layout from the Rebuild movies (like the green middle stomach armour band) but have it as simple paint, rather than having it glow. The weird bluish-grey of the spine and jaw would be replaced with sliver. I'd change the armour to the metallic, candy-purple of the Soul of Chogokin figure (seen here ) and possibly tone down the orange a bit. In terms of physical changes, I'd keep it much the same, with the general changes listed above. Unit 02 (Nigouki): I would add a lot more white to the colour scheme, with a white middle stomach armour band, white forearms, white pylons, white knee fins, and a white head. The orange would be kept as a spot colour, maybe on the striping on the arms, and on the tip of the pylons. The head would still have red accenting, on the jaw and around the face. The red would be made a slightly darker, deeper red than before, with a similar metallic lustre to Unit 01. In terms of physical changes, as well as the aforementioned general changes, I would give it substantially increased pylons (complete with a folded away "Progressive Sword" stored inside 1 of them), a second set of "mini-pylons" jutting from its back, 1 on either side of the entry plug hatch, both containing a Progressive Knife. Jump jets would be added to the main pylons. The head would undergo major revision, with 2 curved red horns added to the forehead, and the goggle-eyes replaced with more traditional unit 01 style "slit" eyes. Unit 00 (Zerogoki): This is the Evangelion I'd keep closest to the original, colour-wise at least. It would still be blue, a nice, vibrant, bright indigo, but with white accenting in a similar way to the green that was added to Rebuild Unit 01. That's about as far as I'd go with colour changes (I'd keep the prototype phase colour scheme more or less the same). With regards to physical changes, the head would stay basically the same, but with 2 smaller "sub-lenses" next to the main eye lens. It would be redesigned to reflect a "support" role, with an emphasis on ranged combat and defense. 1 arm would have a slightly enlarged shoulder pylon, containing a grenade launcher, and would have additional armour plating and a mini "shield plate", similar to the armour of the Tau from Warhammer 40,000 (seen here ). The other arm would have the normal amount of armour, and either a significantly smaller pylon or no pylon at all. Other than that, the normal changes would apply. Anyway, enough of my rambling. What do YOU think?

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri Apr 05, 2013 2:22 pm Sounds good. Regarding Unit 02, I was thinking about the second set of shoulder pylons pointing downwards and opening beneath the armpits, similar to a shoulder holster . If the series would take place after EoE, might also consider Unit 02 initially wearing a small powered exoskeleton as movement-assisting prosthetic until its musculature finishes regenerating from being nommed by Da Harpies; if not, consider Unit 00 having it instead, as a consequence of being the first completed Eva and thus having some problems with its muscle tone (either too weak muscles or the sync system is acting up with them).

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Apr 05, 2013 4:28 pm I don't know if I would redesign. However, if I were to be in charge someone I would recolor Eva 04 pure white keeping the red it has in rebuild(or that little game machine). So it can be opposites with Eva 03 (Black/Blue and White/Red). I do think its also fitting because white also means death, it is unit 04.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Fri Apr 05, 2013 5:03 pm I'd like more traditional super robot designs. It would make the scary moments even more horrifying by the juxtaposition of bright, Fisher-Price-esque mecha with violence and bloodshed. The Evas would still be organic, but their metal armor would be better at disguising their forms.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Apr 05, 2013 5:26 pm Not armour, remember - restraints. A redesign could emphasise that somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Sat Apr 06, 2013 7:10 am I think it would be kinda cool if they made them more reptile like, sort of like Metal Gear Ray from the MGS series. That said I don't think they should change them too much.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sat Apr 06, 2013 12:58 pm pwhodges wrote: A redesign could emphasize that somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat Apr 06, 2013 2:09 pm I would redesign them to have the best of all traits from all forms of animals, unless there is a better, artificial design. So in other words, a winged-centaur-type being. The arms, opposable thumbs, and upright upper-torso is a superior design from primates. Give it the ability to completely pivot vertically so it can stoop over, and it makes it better for fitting into tight spaces. Wings that are amphibious and can fly would be most effective in traversing aerial and aquatic terrain (you could probably fit missiles under them too). A quadrupedal torso design with toes of some sort, as well as limbs that can pose both back and forth (even some jets at the bottom of the feet, as was featured with Eva-00 during the Matarael battle) to have better hold on the terrain would make for the greatest mobility on the ground. In order to fit through tight spaces, the legs could fold up in order to crawl, and if facing in CQB situations it can easily switch into a bipedal format, allowing use of both hands and front hooves/feet.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Sun Apr 07, 2013 10:35 am They'd be on fire and have skull-like heads and batwings that are on fire. For the HARDCORE MATOOR TEENAGUR demographic.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Apr 07, 2013 11:32 pm i would make all the evangelions black and red because black and red are the coolest colors and because cool colors are edgy just like evangelions concepts and i think it would appea to teenagers more and fanfiction writers too because i love evangelion fanfiction and i think that we need more of it because nothing good has come out of evangelion for 15 years except the fanfiction (srsly adam kamon is better than hideaki anno at this point, be honest with yourself) i would also give the evangelions big nike stripes on their feet because it would be a good way to raise money to fund anno's rehab from his lithium habit and maybe one day, one day he will be as good as he was in the 90s when he was all depressed and not all sunny like he is today. nikes also look cool and i think the best picture is 'evangelion: just do it' all the evangelions would have red hachimaki (hachimaki is Japanese for headband, for you non nihongophiles here) and would weild katanas because swords are cool and i think that evangelion needs to be more like a kurosawa movie. that would be badass. actually one eva should be blue and have spikes because then it would look like sonic and sonic is the most edgy character there is (much cooler than that boring plumber mario) ooh, and give unit-02 a sonic screwdriver and askuk can be one of the doctors companions. it cna have a tardis for an entry plug.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Sun Apr 07, 2013 11:41 pm All of them should just look like this Because why not?

[]:             Quote Post by edwardthefma » Sun Apr 07, 2013 11:41 pm I. woud take auskas advice and be frugal with my money and not sink my battel ship with too much a over priced ammo

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 08, 2013 2:13 am I'd make them essentially naked, with limited restraints taking the visual form of grotesque, clearly invasive bondage gear and torture equipment. With their fleshy appearances exposed, the Evas would all have a chance to look different from each other. I'll spare the details, because nobody cares, save two: there would be absolutely no superficial mammalian features, and all of the Evas would be darkies, because that swarthy skin is so sexy.

[]:             Quote Post by GAR Shinji » Mon Apr 08, 2013 4:01 am Give them big damn lasers, built into the chestplate or something. EVA BEAM!! *zap* Also, the arsenal should include humongous hammers and drills, perfect for turning angels into goop.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Wed Apr 10, 2013 2:10 am Squigsquasher wrote: I was going to try sketching up everybody's ideas and submit them to this thread... But now... Oh fuck it, as soon as I get a scanner I'm doing it anyway!

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Apr 10, 2013 4:38 am I'd give Eva-01 a hunchback and a massive underbite. Eva-00's armor would have an urban camouflage pattern and she would wield a club to beat her enemies to death with. Eva-02 would look pretty much the same except she'd be wearing a wrestling mask.

[]:             Quote Post by sephiros » Wed Apr 10, 2013 10:45 am Shouldn't the pimp cane be gold or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 10, 2013 10:59 am Piston arms and rocket fists. Can't get enough of those.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 10, 2013 12:50 pm Upgrade List: 1. Make control levers feel like touching boobs. 2. Make brighter colors, because purple and green gives the impression of a massive booger. 3. Add iPod support with external speakers. Nothing like listening to "When the Angels fall" while whooping some Angel ass. Y'see, they should just hire me right now. I'm getting innovative up in these bitches. (Pun intended.) All that crap was a joke. Here are the real ideas. 1. Remove the pain receptors in the Eva. That stuff is total bullshit, pilots don't need the pain. Being able to feel everything else is useful, but toss the pain crap. 2. Make the Evas darker and less... cartoony . Strike fear into your enemies instead of incapacitating them through laughter. 3. Give the Evas the ability to fly. With, like, jets or something. 4. Bigger internal batteries, people. God. 5. Make the control levers feel like boobs. I was serious about that one.
